mission_alignment: Improves a current mission lane through a bounded runtime or structural follow-up.
notes: Example fast-path submission from a third-party host.

fast_path.claimed_value: Provides a bounded mechanism with likely reusable value.
fast_path.first_pass_summary: Quickly understandable candidate with clear likely route and bounded proof need.
fast_path.why_this_route: Primary value is a repeatedly callable runtime capability.
fast_path.why_not_alternatives: Architecture-only treatment would miss the reusable runtime objective.
fast_path.need_bounded_proof: Need one bounded proof artifact before promotion.
